issue_title: Tabs and links open a new window
issue_body_preview:
Opening on a new tab
![resim](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2b5df341-3819-42e8-ad0e-e57119d88578)
Or clicking any inline link opens a new smaller window instead of a new tab 

![resim](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/78f1ff3c-d185-4161-96b3-61a1ec8ba875)

It doesn't err
test_description_zh: 在 Penpot Desktop 应用中，点击页面内的内联链接或尝试在新标签页中打开链接，观察链接打开的方式和窗口行为。
expected_result_zh: 点击内联链接或在新标签页中打开链接时，应在应用内以新标签页的形式打开，而不是弹出一个新的独立小窗口。
